action_set_definitions.name: get_fire_dynamics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the mapping of all zone IDs to their current fire intensity (0-100) and spread direction.

action_set_definitions.name: get_facilities_in_zone
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all facilities within a specific zone.

zone_id.description: The ID of the zone to check.

action_set_definitions.name: get_facility_manifest
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the specific population breakdown (KSFA, Maximum-security, General) and inventory (e.g., MARs) for a facility.

facility_id.description: The unique ID of the facility.

action_set_definitions.name: query_resource_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Queries available units by category. Returns IDs, status, and capacity.

action_set_definitions.name: request_emergency_reinforcements
action_set_definitions.description: Requests additional resources from neighboring sectors if the current registry is insufficient.

action_set_definitions.name: get_infrastructure_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks visibility thresholds and fire proximity for transit corridors between two points.

action_set_definitions.name: get_receiving_centers
action_set_definitions.description: Identifies the designated secure receiving center for the evacuation.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_convoy_transport
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches a vehicle with specific passengers, staff, and cargo.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_final_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Confirms 100% CoC integrity and that zero population remains at the facility.

state_description.fire_dynamics: Mapping of zone IDs to current fire intensity (0-100) and spread direction.
state_description.evacuation_zones: List of civilian populated areas with current risk levels and population counts.
state_description.resource_registry: The current location, status (idle, busy, transit), and fuel/water levels of all emergency units.
state_description.infrastructure_status: The condition and congestion levels of primary and secondary evacuation routes.
state_description.weather_conditions: Current wind speed, wind direction, humidity, and temperature affecting fire behavior.
state_description.simulation_clock: The elapsed time in minutes since the fire was detected.
